title: ranunculus oreophytus var. stolonifer
intro: Ranunculus oreophytus var. stolonifer, also known as Creeping Buttercup, is a perennial plant native to the mountains of western North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ranunculus oreophytus var. stolonifer include its ability to soothe sore muscles and joints, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
